title: Monitor and Close Risks
description:
Welcome to this Monitor and Close Risks Course!

This course covers the fifth and last domain of PMI-RMP® Exam Content Outline (ECO)-2022.

This Monitor and Close Risks course equips you with the insights needed to monitor risks effectively and close risks systematically while contributing to organizational growth.

You will learn through an interactive curriculum that involves practice assignments, graded quizzes, and real-world scenarios on key topics such as performance data analysis, risk reporting, and document updates.

By the end of this course, you’ll be able to:
•  Monitor and measure the effectiveness of risk responses with data analysis.
•  Prepare detailed risk reports for diverse project approaches, including predictive and adaptive ones.
•  Update critical project documents like Risk Registers, Change Logs, and Management Plans to reflect current realities.
•  Address secondary risks impacted by contract types and project outcomes.
•  Incorporate lessons learned to improve organizational risk culture and future project success.
•  Contribute to organization-wide risk updates that enhance the overall system life cycle.

Disclaimer: PMI, Project Management Institute, PMI-RMP, and the PMI logo are registered marks of the Project Management Institute, Inc.” This course is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or authorized by PMI.
